GenAiFunction.description: Runs three Monte Carlo simulations to produce the standard sales forecast tiers: Commit (deals with >=80% probability), Most Likely (deals >=50%), and Best Case (all open deals). Use this when the user asks: "What is my commit vs. best case?", "Show me my forecast scenarios", "What's my upside this quarter?", or any question about forecast tiers. Both inputs are optional: revenueTarget (if provided, adds probability-of-hitting-target to each tier), timeHorizonDays (defaults to end of current quarter). Call this immediately without asking for a revenue target — if the user did not mention a dollar amount, omit revenueTarget and the summary will show expected revenues per tier. Outputs: overallSummary (read directly to user), plus per-tier expected revenues and opportunity counts.
